title: Anti-B7H3 antibody-exatecan analog conjugate and medicinal use thereof
abstract: Disclosed by the present invention are an anti-B7H3 antibody-exatecan analog conjugate, a preparation method therefor and an anti-tumor medicinal use thereof.
claims: 1. A ligand-drug conjugate of formula (Pc-L b -Y-Dr) or a pharmaceutically acceptable salt or solvate thereof:
